title: Cloud Backup & Sync
server_url_description: Server address for Google OAuth proxy
sign_in_prompt: Sign in with Google to use cloud backup and sync
backup_retention_policy: Backup retention: All backups from last 7 days kept, older ones kept monthly, auto-deleted after one year.
confirm_sign_out: Are you sure you want to sign out? This will stop auto sync.
confirm_restore: Are you sure you want to restore from this backup? This will overwrite all current data.
auth_code_missing: Failed to obtain serverAuthCode (Please verify Google Cloud Console has the correct Web Client ID and forceCodeForRefreshToken is true)
gis_not_loaded: Google Identity Services SDK not loaded (not supported in WebView)
sharing_auth_prompt_body:
This operation requires additional Google Drive read/write permissions (access shared files created by this app).

We will initiate a second authorization. Please check and agree to "View and edit specific files created by this app" in the following Google sign-in window.
sharing_auth_cancelled: User cancelled the permission request; this operation cannot proceed.
picker_title_with_ids: Please authorize access to this shared ledger
picker_title_without_ids: Find shared ledger in "Shared with me" (starts with EasyAccounting_Shared)
